evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: trusted data foundation; governance standards; quality standards; safe in mental healthcare
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour dominates: emphasis on trust, governance, quality, and safety in healthcare with no velocity signals.
evidence.domain_risk: healthcare; mental healthcare; AI systems in healthcare
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: High: regulated healthcare domain with AI safety and explainability requirements makes this high-risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: design and own; design enterprise semantic layers; establishing standards; AI agents
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Early: first data architecture role (design and own the foundation) despite sophisticated AI requirements.
evidence.jd_authorship: Designing and maintaining Microsoft Fabric and Power BI semantic models; Building scalable ETL/ELT pipelines; Enabling AI agents with business context
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tools (Microsoft Fabric, Power BI, DAX, LLM, RAG) and AI/healthcare context show hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: internal data infrastructure; AI systems; executive dashboards
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data layer serving AI agents and executive reporting.
evidence.autonomy_level: design and own; establishing standards; direct influence on architecture
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic: ownership and architecture direction-setting demonstrate leadership authority.
evidence.ai_role: Enabling AI agents with business context; building the trusted data foundation that makes AI useful, explainable and safe
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate builds data infrastructure that AI systems consume—clear ai_enabler signal.
evidence.testing_framing: Establishing data governance and quality standards
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality is a named responsibility without explicit testing framework.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: trusted data foundation; safe in mental healthcare; governance and quality standards; explainable and safe
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High: trust, safety, and explainability in healthcare context dominate; fear is bad AI decisions affecting patient care.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: design and own the analytical foundation; Building scalable ETL/ELT; design enterprise semantic layers
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Greenfield: building the foundational data architecture from the ground up.
